\tzpentry{ID4462}{Chemical Potential Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4462 introduces Chemical Potential Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$J_R^\mu = \nabla_\nu \left( \mathcal{R}_T \cdot g^{\mu\nu}_T \right) \cdot \chi_T \equiv \sum_{i=1}^{153,600} \Phi_i \cdot \mathbf{v}_i \cdot \delta(r - r_i)$$
